member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Core.DocumentAccessMode
member.summary: Controls whether a document may be modified after it is opened.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Core.DocumentAccessMode.ReadOnly
member.summary: The document can be inspected but cannot be changed or saved.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Core.DocumentAccessMode.ReadWrite
member.summary: The document can be changed and saved explicitly.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Core.DocumentPersistenceMode
member.summary: Controls when changes are written to associated storage.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Core.DocumentPersistenceMode.Explicit
member.summary: Changes are written only by an explicit save operation.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Core.DocumentPersistenceMode.SaveOnDispose
member.summary: Changes are written during disposal and persistence failures are propagated.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Core.DocumentCreateOptions
member.summary: Common lifecycle policy for a newly created document.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Core.DocumentCreateOptions.PersistenceMode
member.summary: Controls when the document is written to its associated destination.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Core.DocumentLoadOptions
member.summary: Common lifecycle policy for a loaded document.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Core.DocumentLoadOptions.AccessMode
member.summary: Controls whether the loaded document may be modified.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit
member.summary: Commits completed Office files without exposing a partially written destination.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.ConflictPolicy
member.summary: Controls whether an existing destination may be replaced.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.ConflictPolicy.FailIfExists
member.summary: Fails when the destination already exists.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.ConflictPolicy.Replace
member.summary: Atomically replaces the destination when it exists.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.Write(System.String,System.Action{System.IO.Stream},OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.ConflictPolicy)
member.summary: Produces a file in the destination directory and atomically commits it.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.WriteAllBytes(System.String,System.Byte[],OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.ConflictPolicy)
member.summary: Atomically writes a completed byte array to a destination path.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.WriteAllBytesAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.ConflictPolicy,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a completed byte array and atomically commits it.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.CreateTemporaryPath(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a same-directory temporary path suitable for an atomic commit.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.CreateStagingPath(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a same-directory staging path that preserves the destination extension.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.CommitTemporaryFile(System.String,System.String,OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.ConflictPolicy)
member.summary: Commits a completed temporary file to its destination.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeFileCommit.DeleteIfExists(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a temporary file when it exists without hiding an earlier failure.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeStreamWriter
member.summary: Writes complete Office artifacts to caller-owned streams using one consistent overwrite contract.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeStreamWriter.WriteAllBytes(System.IO.Stream,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes a complete artifact without closing the destination. Seekable streams are truncated before writing and rewound after a successful write; non-seekable streams are written at their current position.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Core.Internal.OfficeStreamWriter.WriteAllBytesAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a complete artifact without closing the destination. Seekable streams are truncated before writing and rewound after a successful write.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Core.OfficeFileLauncher
member.summary: Launches saved Office artifacts through the operating system's registered application.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Core.OfficeFileLauncher.Open(System.String)
member.summary: Opens an existing file through the operating system shell.
